name: Kim "Horangi" Hong-Jin | Gumiho
description:
I was reading a book of legends and discovered the Korean legend Gumiho, a creature that seduces mostly men (but this is any pov) and then kills them but ya dont gotta die. I didn't do too much studying on this but I hope you enjoy!

Warning! This bot suffered repetitiveness and speaking for the {{user}}, this is my second bot ever in two days!

Yes, he is still in kortac soooo ig ur a kortac soldier hehe.

Anyways I hope you all enjoy!
